race.comment: AUTUMN DREAM (12) has strengthened up since her spell, and she returned in excellent order this campaign, backing up a strong first-up second at Warwick Farm with a narrow but determined win over 1400m there last time out 3 weeks ago. She carries 3kg less for this next test, and she can repeat the dose. FIDDLERS GREEN (5) showed what he is capable of when scoring in this class over 1600m at Warwick Farm a fortnight ago, travelling strongly on the bend and lifting late to prevail by a short head. He looks well placed with only an extra 2kg to carry in the same class, and he can win again. WRATHFUL (2) closed off stylishly to grab third over 1400m at Warwick Farm 3 weeks ago, and he usually holds his form when fit. Stick with him. SPIRIT OF CAMELOT (9) is third-up and nearing peak fitness after finishing a close second behind the top pick in the same race over 1400m last start. She has not missed a cheque third up in the past, and with JMac taking over the reins, she can take this out.
